---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

# Minhyun Lee

AI Researcher

Samsung Electronics AI Center

minhyunlee.ai [AT] gmail.com

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&hl=ko) / [GitHub](https://github.com/gaviotas) / [CV PDF](static/uploads/resume.pdf)

- [About](#about)
- [News](#news)
- [Publications](#publications)
- [Education](#education)
- [Experience](#experience)
- [Academic Services](#academic-services)

#### About {#about}

I am a Research Staff member at Samsung Electronics AI Center, where I work on semiconductor data intelligence and layout pattern generation. My research focuses on practical industrial machine learning systems that remain reliable when supervision is limited and data pipelines are imperfect.

Before joining Samsung Electronics, I completed my M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology at Yonsei University advised by Prof. Hyunjung Shim. My earlier research centered on weak supervision, semantic segmentation, localization, and representation learning, and my current work extends that foundation into semiconductor data and generative modeling.

My current research interests include:

1. Misalignment prediction and robust preprocessing for semiconductor-chip data
2. Label-efficient learning for industrial vision systems
3. Layout pattern generation using diffusion, vision-language, and reinforcement learning based approaches

#### News {#news}

- 01.2025: `MaskRIS` accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR).
- 01.2025: `Fine-Grained Image-Text Correspondence with Cost Aggregation for Open-Vocabulary Part Segmentation` accepted to CVPR 2025.
- 12.2024: Joined Samsung Electronics AI Center as Research Staff.
- 10.2024: Started research work at Samsung Electronics SAIT on image generation.
- 08.2024: Completed M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology at Yonsei University.
- 07.2024: `SeiT++: Masked Token Modeling Improves Storage-efficient Training` accepted to ECCV 2024.
- 12.2023: Completed research internship at NAVER Cloud on storage-efficient vision training and industrial-scale model development.
- 01.2023: `Saliency as pseudo-pixel supervision for weakly and semi-supervised semantic segmentation` published in PAMI.

#### Publications {#publications}

{{< include /_partials/_publications.qmd >}}

#### Education {#education}

Yonsei University  
M.S. and Ph.D. in Integrated Technology, Mar. 2019 - Aug. 2024

Yonsei University  
B.S. in Computer Science, Mar. 2012 - Feb. 2019

#### Experience {#experience}

Samsung Electronics AI Center  
Research Staff, Dec. 2024 - Present

Samsung Electronics SAIT  
Research Staff, Oct. 2024 - Dec. 2024

NAVER Cloud  
Research Internship, Jul. 2023 - Dec. 2023

Yonsei University  
Ph.D. Student, Mar. 2019 - Aug. 2024

Yonsei University  
Student Intern, Jan. 2018 - Sep. 2018

#### Academic Services {#academic-services}

Academic service details will be updated.
